turns.speaker: D
turns.text: stephanie morales , medical record number 113322 . 44-year-old female that presents today six weeks status post right medial unicompartmental arthroplasty . hello !

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hi , how is the doctor doing ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good , how is stephanie morales doing ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: stephanie morales is all right .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: how's the knee treating stephanie morales ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the knee is good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good . any problems ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , no problems , uh , just still the numbness on this side .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . the area of numbness will get smaller as the nerves that innervate the skin across the knee heal .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: right . okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so lem me take a look at stephanie morales's right knee .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , and relax for the doctor . good . all right , and bend . good . that looks good . um , the incision looks nice .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: let's look at stephanie morales's x-rays . uh , stephanie morales's x-rays look good . so here's what stephanie morales has got going on in stephanie morales's knee . uh , the right knee arthroplasty looks good . everything's lined up nicely . um , that's looking at the right knee arthroplasty from the front . and this is looking at the right knee arthroplasty from the side . and then this was underneath stephanie morales's kneecap , but the doctor did n't do anything there . but things looks great .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay . stephanie morales is so happy with how the surgery went . stephanie morales has no pain .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah , you know , stephanie morales is still early in stephanie morales's recovery , so the doctor expects stephanie morales to get even better than what stephanie morales is now . um , so keep doing stephanie morales's pt to work on stephanie morales's strength , range of motion , and endurance .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay , stephanie morales will do .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: stephanie morales is probably still gon na have aches and pains occasionally . the doctor usually tells people it's two or three months before stephanie morales feels like stephanie morales is back to stephanie morales's self again , so stephanie suggest doing really well .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay . that's really good to know . thank you .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah , let's plan to talk again in six weeks . so if stephanie morales stops at the desk on stephanie morales's way out today , the desk staff are going to get stephanie morales set up for a telemedicine visit . and the telemedicine visit'll just be to check in and see how stephanie morales is doing and make sure things are progressing okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure , okay . and can stephanie morales ask the doctor about work before stephanie morales goes ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , as the doctor knows , stephanie morales works for ups , and stephanie morales is not able to go back yet because of going up and down steps with the position stephanie morales has . however , ups is asking stephanie morales to come back to work where stephanie morales can sit for the shift with breaks .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . the doctor , the doctor do n't want stephanie morales lifting greater than five or 10 pounds , and no standing or sitting longer than a half an hour . uh , usually that means stephanie morales ca n't do a ups job .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: all right . so would the doctor write a note to excuse stephanie morales for another six weeks ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: sure . the doctor 'll have the doctor's nurse anna give the note to stephanie morales .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: that's great . thank you .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , so the doctor and stephanie morales will talk again in six weeks , and the doctor and stephanie morales can discuss stephanie morales's job again at that time .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sounds good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah , those , um , are the types of , of jobs that take a good three months until stephanie morales is kind of ready to get back to doing that kind of labor-intensive work .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay , and driving now ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: uh , the doctor has plenty of data that says normal reflex time is returned at six weeks , and then stephanie morales's return to driving is determined by when stephanie morales is ready and feels safe to be driving .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah . so hang tight . anna will bring the note back in to stephanie morales , and the doctor and stephanie morales will talk in six weeks .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: all right , that sounds good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: uh , but keep working hard on , on pt in the meantime though .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: stephanie morales definitely will . thank you .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , have a good rest of your day .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the doctor as well .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , this is a six-week post-op meeting exam for stephanie morales . stephanie morales's gait was antalgic with a slight limp and decreased velocity . stephanie morales's not using an assistive device . right knee focused exam has a healed surgical scar , mild swelling , tenderness- tenderness . . on the area of the incision . range of motion is zero to 120 degrees . everything else normal . radiographs were three views of the right knee taken today and show implants in stable position . no evidence of loosening or early complications . thanks .
